# Untainted Art

> AI-powered tools to clean up images and text — remove watermarks, erase unwanted objects, and strip hidden characters.

Untainted Art is a free web app offering two utilities: an image editor that uses AI inpainting to remove watermarks and unwanted objects from photos, and a text cleaner that strips invisible and unwanted characters from pasted text.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Image cleanup and text cleaning tools.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account to use the image tool.
